name: New Skill Proposal
about: Propose a new AI skill before submitting a PR
title: "[SKILL] <platform>/<skill-name>: short description"
labels: new-skill
assignees: ''
---

## Skill Summary

**Name:**
**Platform:** <!-- claude / openai / gemini / generic -->
**Target models:** <!-- e.g. claude-sonnet-4-6, gpt-4o, gemini-2.0-flash -->

**One-line description:**

## What does this skill do?

Explain the capability this skill adds to the AI assistant.

## Example Interaction

**System prompt (excerpt or summary):**

**User input:**
```
<example user message>
```

**Expected model output:**
```
<example model response>
```

## Why should this be in the library?

How broadly useful is this skill? Who would use it?

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing skills and this is not a duplicate.
- [ ] I have tested this skill with at least one listed model.
- [ ] This skill does not include any API keys or sensitive data.
- [ ] I am willing to maintain this skill or hand it off.
